text:
Okay, I guess...

There was a group of kids playing street hockey in the park once, and it looked fun. They had a goal at the edge of the ice, swinging a stick at a rubber puck they'd slap onto the blade. It's messy out there, they talked. They're scoring!

They start doing a dance to distract the goalie—it's obviously successful because the goalie had dropped his stick.

One kid leans over to grab the stick. The puck flies out, and he scores—into the net. They clap and celebrate.

Everyone's laughing as they run around. Then they hear someone shouting something from far away.

"Mama?"

Moments later...

"I got a penalty! I tripped on my own feet!" The kid laughs, hopping awkwardly. A girl points at someone else on the opposing team. "He tripped me!"

"Awful!" someone else says.

They go around asking who it was.

"You couldn't run?"

"No. I didn't want
